Side · your AI sidekick

99% of people don’t code, that’s a fact.
Side is here to change that forever.

AI is moving faster than anyone can keep up with, and most people still can’t see how it works. You can chat with a model, but you never see how agents think, how they plan, or how they work together. So people either trust AI blindly or stay a little scared of it. There’s no simple place to hand AI one prompt, watch it work, and understand what it did.

Side turns one plain-English prompt into a shipped result you can watch. Connect your models, tools, and APIs once. Type what you want, and Side shows you the plan first — the goal, the steps, the agents, the cost — before anything runs. A fleet of agents then works on a visual canvas, and anything risky stops at a gate that shows you the exact change. Open source, on your machine. Think n8n for the AI age: you learn by watching, not reading.

Start from a blank canvas

Drop in the nodes yourself — prompt, brain, tools, agents, gates.

event

webhook
When metrics move

signal
$curl -fsSL sboghossian.github.io/side/install.sh | sh
-> installs the Side CLI on your machine
OK it is yours — open source, your keys, nothing phones home
agent
* Side · http://localhost:4600

Side is for anyone who wants to understand AI, not just use it — students, operators, founders, anyone who feels behind and wants to catch up. No code needed. You hand Side one prompt, watch the fleet plan and work, and approve what matters. You come away able to control AI instead of being rushed along by it. That’s why I built it.

github.com/sboghossian/side·MIT·open source

Side

Install Side

One command. It runs on your machine, with your keys. Nothing leaves your computer.

curl -fsSL sboghossian.github.io/side/install.sh | sh
-> detecting platform… darwin-arm64
-> installing Side v1.0
OK installed. run `agent` to start.
agent

OK ready. opening your browser…

Welcome to Side

You give the goal. Your agents plan it, build it, and bring it back for your yes. Let's set up your profile so the work sounds like you.

Cost & budget

Live spend, budget caps, and where the tokens go — nothing phones home.

Brain

Your memory and code as a living graph. Agents ground on this instead of guessing.

Routines

What runs while you sleep. Toggle it, see the next run, or run it now.

Machines & fleet health

Every service and machine, live. The watchdog restarts what dies.

Marketplace

Install skills, agents, and fleet rails. Every plugin is SHA-256 verified.

Reports

Standups, cost, heartbeat, and weekly digests as a filterable newsroom.

Security & audit

Every action is append-only logged. Your keys, your machine, nothing leaves.
